content: Provides structured task tracking guidelines for Level 3 (Intermediate Feature) tasks, using visual tracking elements and clear checkpoints.
A task entry must be structured with a title, requirements, affected components, implementation steps, required creative phases, checkpoints, and current status.
The update protocol dictates the sequence of status updates: from the task entry to flagging creative phases, completing design, implementation, and marking the task complete.

Checkpoint verification requires specific items to be documented or completed for each phase: all requirements documented, affected components listed, design decisions documented, code changes tracked, test results recorded, and documentation updates completed.
Document management should track active documents and identify the next required documents for the task.
